fix_boundary.notes: Production reconcile now materializes a truthful inventory-backed bucket-scoped S3.11 finding when Security Hub never produced a row.

work_items.notes: Post-deploy ingest still returned no_changes_detected, but reconcile plus compute now surfaced a truthful resolved finding. Because the seeded lifecycle rule is compliant, production still exposes no open action and the additive-merge execution chain cannot be claimed truthfully.

retained_blockers: Security Hub ingest still does not surface the seeded lifecycle bucket
The truthful seeded lifecycle bucket resolves as compliant after reconcile, so production still provides no open WI-1 action to preview or create
WI-1 therefore remains BLOCKED even though the missing-finding materialization bug is fixed
